title: basilicum riparium
intro: Basilicum riparium, also known as sweet basil, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is native to India and Southeast Asia, and its leaves have been used for centuries in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of basilicum riparium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of colds and fever. Basilicum riparium can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or dried herb for use in various herbal preparations, such as topical creams and infusions.
